title: session/rebind-procedure-revision — C4 model
description: Component-level view of the revised continuation procedure: one classifier + one executor + one shared digest helper + two sibling fragments routed through an extended fragment registry. Sits inside the session runtime container; touches the codex-provider continuation package read-only.

systems.name: OpenCode runtime
systems.description: Single-process bun daemon hosting session runloop, provider adapters, fragment registry, and runtime-event service.

containers.name: Session runtime
containers.description: packages/opencode/src/session/* — owns runloop, message persistence, compaction, fragment composition, rebind epoch.

containers.name: Provider registry
containers.description: packages/opencode/src/provider/* — chain-semantics classification, SDK adapters, account/auth state.

containers.name: Codex provider package (external)
containers.description: @opencode-ai/codex-provider — owns lastResponseId per-shard storage and invalidateContinuationFamily. Read-only from this plan's perspective.

components.name: ProviderChainSemantics
components.description: Static registry classifying each providerId as SS / SL / Hybrid. Single source of truth for chain-awareness.

components.name: ContinuationEvent + classifier
components.description: Discriminated union of 12 event kinds; classify((kind, providerClass)) → ContinuationDecision per the canonical matrix.

components.name: Continuation.run executor
components.description: Single entry point. Orchestrates digest capture → invalidation → pending-injection mark → epoch bump → telemetry. Replaces direct invalidateContinuationFamily call sites.

components.name: CommitmentDigest helper
components.description: captureDigest(sessionID) scans MessageV2 stream for mutation-class tools, truncates to N=5, scrubs secrets. renderDigest(entries) emits prose body for fragment composition.

components.name: ChainInitNotice fragment
components.description: User-role context fragment fired once-after-chain-break. Body composes chain-reset framing, round numbering, commitment digest, recovery affordance hints.

components.name: AmnesiaNotice fragment (extended)
components.description: Existing compaction notice; body extended to embed commitment digest via shared renderer; decision helper unchanged.

components.name: FragmentRegistry (policy enum extended)
components.description: Adds chain_stable and once_after_chain_break policies; removes session_stable. Every fragment audited and re-tagged.

components.name: RebindEpoch (payload extended)
components.description: Existing epoch bumper; session.rebind event payload extended with chainBreakClass field.

components.name: prompt.ts call sites (3)
components.description: Lines 460, 1208, 1451 rewired from direct invalidateContinuationFamily into Continuation.run dispatch.

components.name: compaction.ts call sites (2)
components.description: Lines 189, 3622 rewired into Continuation.run dispatch with kind=compaction_*.

components.name: transport-ws.ts call sites (4)
components.description: Lines 561/571/581/607 rewired into Continuation.run dispatch with kind=backend_failure_forced_resend (Phase E).

relationships.description: invalidateContinuationFamily(sessionID) when breaksChain=true; no-op for non-codex providers
bumpEpoch when bumpsRebindEpoch=true; emits session.rebind with chainBreakClass
chain_stable fragments invalidate cache on epoch bump
